mapper.select:
SELECT SCHEDULE_SN AS scheduleSn, SCHEDULE_NM AS scheduleNm, SCHEDULE_CN AS scheduleCn, TO_CHAR(SCHEDULE_START_DE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS scheduleStartDe, TO_CHAR(SCHEDULE_END_DE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS scheduleEndDe, SCHEDULE_FILE_PATH AS scheduleFilePath, SCHEDULE_FILE_NM AS scheduleFileNm, SCHEDULE_FILE_ORG_NM AS scheduleFileOrgNm, REGIST_DE AS registDe, REGIST_ID AS registId, UPDATE_DE AS updateDe, UPDATE_ID AS updateId FROM TB_SCHEDULE WHERE 1=1
AND SCHEDULE_NM LIKE '%' || #{scheduleNm} || '%'
ORDER BY SCHEDULE_START_DE ASC, SCHEDULE_END_DE DESC

SELECT SCHEDULE_SN AS scheduleSn, SCHEDULE_NM AS scheduleNm, SCHEDULE_CN AS scheduleCn, TO_CHAR(SCHEDULE_START_DE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS scheduleStartDe, TO_CHAR(SCHEDULE_END_DE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS scheduleEndDe, SCHEDULE_FILE_PATH AS scheduleFilePath, SCHEDULE_FILE_NM AS scheduleFileNm, SCHEDULE_FILE_ORG_NM AS scheduleFileOrgNm, REGIST_DE AS registDe, REGIST_ID AS registId, UPDATE_DE AS updateDe, UPDATE_ID AS updateId, T.LOC_GEOM.SDO_POINT.X AS locLon, T.LOC_GEOM.SDO_POINT.Y AS locLat, SCHEDULE_ADRES AS scheduleAdres FROM ( SELECT SCHEDULE_SN, SCHEDULE_NM, SCHEDULE_CN, SCHEDULE_START_DE, SCHEDULE_END_DE, SCHEDULE_FILE_PATH, SCHEDULE_FILE_NM, SCHEDULE_FILE_ORG_NM, REGIST_DE, REGIST_ID, UPDATE_DE, UPDATE_ID, SCHEDULE_ADRES, CASE WHEN LOC_GEOM IS NOT NULL THEN SDO_CS.TRANSFORM(LOC_GEOM, 4326) ELSE NULL END AS LOC_GEOM FROM TB_SCHEDULE WHERE SCHEDULE_SN = #{scheduleSn} ) T
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TB_SCHEDULE ( SCHEDULE_SN, SCHEDULE_NM, SCHEDULE_CN, SCHEDULE_START_DE, SCHEDULE_END_DE, SCHEDULE_FILE_PATH, SCHEDULE_FILE_NM, SCHEDULE_FILE_ORG_NM, SCHEDULE_ADRES, REGIST_DE, REGIST_ID, LOC_GEOM ) VALUES ( SEQ_SCHEDULE_SN.NEXTVAL, #{scheduleNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scheduleCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{scheduleStartDe}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{scheduleEndDe}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{scheduleFilePath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scheduleFileNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scheduleFileOrgNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scheduleAdres, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{registId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SDO_GEOMETRY(2001, 4326, SDO_POINT_TYPE(#{locLon, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{locLat, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, NULL), NULL, NULL)
NULL
)
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_SCHEDULE SET SCHEDULE_NM = #{scheduleNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SCHEDULE_CN = #{scheduleCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SCHEDULE_START_DE = TO_DATE(#{scheduleStartDe}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), SCHEDULE_END_DE = TO_DATE(#{scheduleEndDe}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
SCHEDULE_FILE_PATH = #{scheduleFilePath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SCHEDULE_FILE_NM = #{scheduleFileNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SCHEDULE_FILE_ORG_NM = #{scheduleFileOrgNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LOC_GEOM = SDO_GEOMETRY(2001, 4326, SDO_POINT_TYPE(#{locLon}, #{locLat}, NULL), NULL, NULL),
SCHEDULE_ADRES = #{scheduleAdres, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DE = SYSDATE, UPDATE_ID = #{updateId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE SCHEDULE_SN = #{scheduleSn}
mapper.select: SELECT USR_ID AS usrId, USR_PWD AS usrPwd, EMAIL AS email, AUTH_CD AS authCd, REGIST_DE AS registDe FROM USER_INFO WHERE USR_ID = #{usrId} AND USR_PWD = #{usrPwd} -- AND AUTH_CD IS NOT NULL -- For approved users if mapped
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_INFO ( USR_ID, USR_PWD, EMAIL, AUTH_CD, REGIST_DE ) VALUES ( #{usrId}, #{usrPwd}, #{email}, 'AUTH002', -- Default user permission SYSDATE )
